name: Ryan Houben
summary: Full-stack software engineer specializing in .NET and Angular with experience delivering production applications from architecture and implementation to deployment. Passionate about clean architecture, maintainable code, and building reusable software components in collaborative agile teams.

experience.title: Software Engineer (Intern → Software Engineer)
bullets: Built an auditing platform from research through production deployment.
Improved maintainability by refactoring the backend to Clean Architecture.
Led the development of the Angular frontend, driving architecture decisions, implementing new features, and collaborating closely with backend developers to deliver end-to-end functionality.
Designed and maintained a reusable Angular UI component library.

experience.title: Intern Software Developer
bullets: Developed the Angular front-end for the accounting application project.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Developed and maintained WordPress websites alongside my studies.
Set up devices and supported employees with their IT questions.

experience.title: Intern Software Developer
bullets: Developed a survey tool for municipalities that produces a scored output.
